summary: This is an extremely brief blog post consisting of three short announcements about Fog Creek Software. Joel mentions a summer intern working on an ASP to PHP compiler, introduces a new support contact for FogBugz, and shows an architect at a construction site for a new office. There is no substantive argument or analysis; it reads as a quick company update or link post.
key_points: Fog Creek had summer interns working on technical projects like an ASP to PHP compiler
FogBugz support was staffed with a dedicated contact person
Fog Creek was building or renovating a new office space
key_insight: This post is a brief company update with no substantive insight; it simply documents day-to-day happenings at Fog Creek Software.
